error_signature: MongoDB node receives empty value for email
title: MongoDB node not receiving email data
symptom: The MongoDB node receives an empty value for the email field, despite the previous node showing the correct email address.
applies_when: Using a Webhook node to receive data
not_this_if: Email is hardcoded in the MongoDB query
Data is correctly passed in other workflows
root_cause: The MongoDB node may not be configured to interpret the input correctly. If the Query input field is set to Fixed, it will not dynamically use the data passed from the previous node, leading to empty values.
fix_steps: Change the Query input field type from Fixed to Expression
agent_instruction: Change the Query input field type in the MongoDB node to Expression.
